findings.detail: Template choices are present, but the labels feel a little too design-focused for someone not technical.
findings.proposed_solution: Add a short plain-English description under each template so I know what kind of business style it creates.

findings.detail: The chat clears after sending, which makes it feel like my message may have disappeared before I know it was received.
findings.proposed_solution: Keep sent chat messages visible in the conversation so I can confirm what I asked and what was answered.

warnings.detail: Template choices are present, but the labels feel a little too design-focused for someone not technical.
The chat clears after sending, which makes it feel like my message may have disappeared before I know it was received.
